text.title: IH Build-Update Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping numeric-signal availability, ask quality, body length, and slot timing to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Are 3 real numeric signals available AND a specific ask drafted?

conclusion.verdict: SKIP — wait until 3 real numbers available; do not pad
BLOCK — rewrite ask to 1-min specific question
BLOCK — fix TL;DR prefix or length
BLOCK — wait until 6+ days from last IH post
APPROVE — IH post ready to publish

text.example: 3 real numbers + specific ask + TL;DR 145 chars + body 800 chars + Tue 9am ET + 7 days since last IH post → APPROVE.
